summary: Feature adds reusable PageLoadingState, PageEmptyState, and PageErrorState components and applies them across Agents, Integrations, Dashboard, Cockpit, and Settings. Responsive improvements include mobile-friendly grids, hidden/truncated elements at small widths, and compact cockpit badges. Tests cover all three state components plus page-level integration.

strengths: Clean reusable component library (PageLoadingState, PageEmptyState, PageErrorState) with good prop interfaces and data-testid attributes
Dashboard error state uses a smart all-queries-failed check rather than failing on any single query
Responsive design uses Tailwind breakpoint classes consistently (sm:, md:, lg:) with hidden/truncate utilities
Mobile cockpit badges use compact labels (e.g. '3A', '2R') to save space while maintaining information density
Agents page is a proper standalone component with full loading/empty/error states and responsive layout
